summary: Tested 7 assertions: 7 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. NEON fill_rect has 12 exact-match tests covering all widths. NEON alpha blend has 22+ tests with ±1 LSB tolerance vs scalar reference. 5 tests validate gamma-correctness against f64-precision sRGB reference. Edge cases (zero-size, single-pixel, non-aligned widths, transparent/opaque) all covered. Build and all 1555 tests pass. Integration test passes.
